All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
ActionArea
Part of the main frame.
AddDialog
Dialog responsible for adding new transactions.
AllFilter
Filter for RowSorter of the table.
CustDate
Custom date class.
EditDialog
Dialog responsible for editing already existing transactions.
Expense
Extension of the Transaction class, represents an expense.
ExpenseFilter
Filter for RowSorter of the table.
ExpenseTableModel
Custom TableModel.
ExpenseView
Main part of the whole GUI.
Income
Extension of the Transaction class, represents an income.
IncomeFilter
Filter for RowSorter of the table.
Loader
Static class responsible for loading transactions from "transaction.csv" file in the root directory.
Main
Main class of the application - creates and shows the whole GUI.
MainForm
Main form.
Overview
Part of the main form.
Saver
Static class responsible for saving transactions to "transactions.csv" file in the root directory.
Table
Custom JTable.
Transaction
Abstract class for transactions.
